headline: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
summary: Apple is reportedly revamping its entry-level MacBook Pro. Expected launch for the redesigned MacBook Pro is early 2027. Four new iPad Pro models focusing on internal upgrades are also set for spring release.

headline: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
summary: Sony will cease manufacturing discs for new PlayStation games by January 2028. Retailers and gamers express sadness and concern over the move. The decision negatively impacts game preservation and physical media availability.

headline: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft’s looming layoffs and studio closures
summary: Xbox is undergoing a significant "reset" amidst major business challenges. The reset includes looming layoffs and potential studio closures. New CEO Asha Sharma and Chief Content Officer Matt Booty announced the changes to staff.

headline: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX’s AI phone prototype
summary: Elon Musk labels a report about a SpaceX AI phone prototype as "utterly false." The Wall Street Journal claimed SpaceX showed investors a slim, iPhone-like prototype. The alleged prototype was shown before SpaceX's record-breaking IPO in June.

headline: Powerful and Infinitely Reusable Cordless Electric Air Duster for $20 After Coupon
summary: Get a cordless electric air duster for only $20 with a coupon. This powerful duster is infinitely reusable, unlike canned air. Keep your PC and electronics clean and dust-free economically.

headline: GTPLAYER Big and Tall Gaming Chair Drops to Just $159 After Coupon
summary: The GTPLAYER Big and Tall Gaming Chair is now available for $159. A coupon brings down the price for this comfortable gaming chair. Enjoy spacious and ergonomic gaming without a high cost.

headline: ASUS ROG STRIX 27" QD-OLED 240Hz Gaming Monitor Drops to $350
summary: The ASUS ROG STRIX 27" QD-OLED gaming monitor is now $350. This 240Hz refresh rate display offers stunning visuals. It's the lowest price seen for a 27-inch 240Hz OLED monitor.

headline: Ex-Modern Warfare Strategist Launches New Studio, Resisting Live Service Trends
summary: Robert Bowling, former Infinity Ward strategist, has founded a new studio. The studio aims to challenge destructive gaming trends. It specifically pushes back against the pervasive live service model.

headline: Superstar Kane produces his biggest England moment
summary: Harry Kane delivers his most significant moment for England. He performed a World Cup "rescue act" against DR Congo. Football writer Phil McNulty hails it as his greatest career achievement.

headline: Aunt of Venezuelan boy pulled from rubble pledges 'mother's warmth'
summary: Two-year-old Kleiber Moran was rescued after six days in rubble. His aunt vows to provide him with "mother's warmth." The boy survived deadly earthquakes last week in Venezuela.

headline: Afghans claim Turkish police beat them, leading to frostbite and limb loss
summary: Afghan migrants accuse Turkish police of brutal beatings with iron rods. They claim they were stripped and tied in freezing temperatures. These actions allegedly led to severe frostbite and limb loss for some.

headline: Trump's White House windfall: billions unmatched by any president
summary: The article discusses the unprecedented financial gains of former President Trump. His White House tenure allegedly led to billions, far exceeding prior presidents. The White House denies claims of profiting or conflicts of interest.
